name: Trader Daily Routine Agent Instructions

daily_note.description: Live markdown summary for agents and daily sharing
daily_note.command_json: uv run python main.py --profile daily_note --output json
daily_note.command_json_with_flow: uv run python main.py --profile daily_note --output json --assumed-cta-aum 100000000000

json.description: Machine-readable payload with summary text, summary facts, report context, portfolio, proxy flow, capital state, flips, and validation
json.command: uv run python main.py --profile daily_note --output json

json_with_flow.description: Machine-readable payload with proxy flow estimates using an explicit CTA AUM assumption
json_with_flow.command: uv run python main.py --profile daily_note --output json --assumed-cta-aum 100000000000

notes: llm.py reads GEMINI_API_KEY, GEMINI_MODEL, and GEMINI_FALLBACK_MODEL from process env first, then from the repo root .env file
the markdown note path retries malformed primary Gemini output with the configured fallback model before using deterministic summaries
if Gemini fails or returns malformed markdown, the CLI falls back to deterministic summaries

agent_guidance: Run commands from the repo root
Use the daily_note profile unless you explicitly need a different mode
Use --assumed-cta-aum when you want estimated CTA proxy dollar and contract flow in the JSON payload
capital_estimate is always present in JSON output and is labeled as deployed risk and remaining headroom, not cash spent
Use --profile daily_note without --output json when you need a shareable markdown note
Use explicit flags instead of the profile only when you need to override the defaults
